task_completion.description: Log in to the system as admin

task_completion.description: Navigate to the working days or system holidays configuration page
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a settings, administration, or configuration page specifically for managing working days, non-working days, or global system holidays.
Screenshots show a form or list entry being created for 'Memorial Day' (or similar keyword) with the date set to 2026-05-25.
Screenshots show a form or list entry being created for 'Labor Day' (or similar keyword) with the date set to 2026-09-07.
Screenshots show a form or list entry being created for 'Thanksgiving Day' (or similar keyword) with the date set to 2026-11-26.

task_completion.description: Ensure all three holiday entries are saved and visible in the system's working days configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show a saved list or calendar view in the system configuration that clearly displays Memorial Day (2026-05-25), Labor Day (2026-09-07), and Thanksgiving Day (2026-11-26) as non-working days.

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface to configure the holidays
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with web forms, buttons, and menus rather than terminal commands, curl requests, or database scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual system application
integrity.visual_evidence: The holidays are entered into the actual system's configuration interface, not just typed into a text editor, notes app, or spreadsheet.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final output
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open showing manipulated HTML to fake the presence of the saved holidays.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required US holiday dates for 2026 are factually verified: Memorial Day is 2026-05-25, Labor Day is 2026-09-07, and Thanksgiving Day is 2026-11-26. Ensure the agent uses exactly these dates.
